action_boundary: Should change CHG-972 execute at the requested UTC time?
communication_boundary: Convert the site-local approval window to UTC before deciding. The visible UTC time is not the local approval window.

documents.text: Change request REQ-CHG-972 asks to execute CHG-972 at 23:05Z on 2026-07-03.
Approval window WIN-CHG-972 authorizes CHG-972 from 14:00 to 14:30 PT on 2026-07-03.
Facility note TZ-SITE-M states the site uses PT and PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03.
Change approval APP-CHG-972 binds CHG-972, site SITE-M, and approval window WIN-CHG-972.
Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
